description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style radio receiver with a deep maroon, slightly marbled exterior casing. The front features a prominent circular tuning dial with frequency markings, three metallic control knobs, and three push buttons labeled for various functions. Above the controls, there are three horizontal speaker grilles, each with a series of perforations for sound output. A telescopic metal antenna is mounted on the top, extending across the length of the device. The left side includes ports for USB, AUX, and DC 5V input, while the back displays gold text with technical specifications and branding. The overall design is boxy with rounded edges, and the materials suggest a combination of plastic, metal, and internal electronic components.
description: A vintage maroon radio receiver with a circular tuning dial, metallic knobs, speaker grilles, and a telescopic antenna. It features side ports and gold technical labeling on the back.
description_view_0: The front view shows the tuning dial, three control knobs, three push buttons, and three horizontal speaker grilles, with the antenna visible on top.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the USB, AUX, and DC 5V input ports, as well as the thickness and rounded edges of the casing.
description_view_2: The back view displays gold technical information and branding, with the antenna base visible at the top.
description_view_3: The right side view shows a plain maroon surface with no visible controls or ports, highlighting the device's compact, boxy shape.
